app.title: I wrote an bash enumerator because I was sick of xargs
app.author: wallach-game
app.description: BASH Enumerator: A command-line enumerator and argument parser for Bash
proposed_tests: Install bash enumerators with pip and run example script
Compare enumeration speeds of bash-enumerators and xargs
Write a Bash function, parse arguments with Bash enumerators
